title: Apoballis okadae
taxonomy: Apoballis okadae is classified as a species of flowering plant in the family Annonaceae. It belongs to the genus Apoballis, which comprises a small group of flowering plants native to the tropical regions of Southeast Asia. The plant is typically found in lowland forests and is characterized by its distinctive leaf morphology and unique floral features. Apoballis okadae is closely related to other species within the Annonaceae family, which is known for its diverse range of plants and flowers.
